---
title: Get started with persephone3
description: >
  A Short introduction that explains the very first steps to take
  after persephone3 is installed.
---

This short introduction explains the very first steps to take
after `{persephone3}` is installed.

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(persephone3)
# construct a ts-model object
x <- perX13(AirPassengers)
x
# run the model
x$run()
# visualize the results
hchart(x)
```
